## OCTC checklist

- [ ] If this PR bumps **`@1c2c/*`**, in the same train I updated [PORTFOLIO.md](https://github.com/OneClickToControl/octc-platform-internal/blob/main/docs/PORTFOLIO.md) in `octc-platform-internal` and ran `octc:agents:sync` / monorepo verification if applicable.
- [ ] No secrets or PII in the diff.
- [ ] CI green or **Enable auto-merge** after reviewing checks.
